crossroads.name: The Crossroads
intro: 🗺️  A scar of bare road where four ways meet.
Every one of them leads somewhere worse.

village.name: Gravewatch
intro: 🏚️  Gravewatch — the last village with a fire still lit.
Its people do not ask your name. Names are for the dead.

forest.name: The Witherwood
intro: 🌲 The Witherwood, where the trees have stopped pretending to be alive.
Something keeps pace with you, just past the edge of the light.

cave.name: The Gullet
intro: 🕳️  The Gullet — a wound in the rock that breathes cold, wet air.
The dark in here has a weight to it, and it leans on you.

mountain.name: The Ashen Climb
intro: ⛰️  The Ashen Climb. Grey snow falls here, and it is not snow.
What lived on this slope did not die so much as change.

summit.name: The Shrouded Summit
intro: ⛰️  The Shrouded Summit. The Pall pours from the dark ahead like smoke off a pyre.
Whatever is left of the one who began all this has been waiting for you.
